title: Trump defends call urging Balogun red card review: 'It wasn't a foul'
summary_full: "I didn't know what the hell a red card was," said Trump, who called FIFA President Gianni Infantino about the suspension of Folarin Balogun.
summary_public: "I didn't know what the hell a red card was," said Trump, who called FIFA President Gianni Infantino about the suspension of Folarin Balogun.
